message:
✨ Add Presentation Mode to reduce flickering during screen sharing (#241)

- New usePresentationMode hook with localStorage persistence and OS
  prefers-reduced-motion detection
- CSS rules to disable animations, shimmer, star field, and hover
  transforms when presentation mode is active
- Cast icon toggle in navbar with visual indicator when enabled
- Polling intervals slowed 5x (min 5-10 min) across useMCP, useDataCache,
  useDeployMissions, and AlertsContext when in presentation mode
- Stale-while-revalidate pattern in 12 card components: skeletons only
  shown on first load, not during background revalidation
- @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) support for OS-level setting

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
